abilities.description: When you speak a person’s name three times to the wind, roll +wits. On a strong hit, the wind whispers of this person’s need. Envision what you hear (@Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.bd6278f18bbd6739]{Ask the Oracle} if unsure). If you use this information or fulfill this need when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} them, you may reroll any dice (one time only). On a weak hit, as above, but this person’s need creates a troubling dilemma or complication; suffer -1 spirit.

As above, and if you score a strong hit when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, you may also reroll any dice (one time only) when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} from this person.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
